message:
feat(database): add MySQL async client with wire protocol

Implement pure Rust MySQL client with:
- Wire protocol encoding/decoding (4-byte packet header, length-encoded integers/strings)
- mysql_native_password authentication (SHA1-based)
- caching_sha2_password authentication (SHA256-based)
- Text query protocol with full Cx integration for checkpoints and cancellation
- Execute method for simple statements returning affected rows
- Transaction support (begin/commit/rollback)
- Connection URL parsing (mysql://user:pass@host:port/db)
- TLS support via MySqlConnectOptions with SslMode configuration

The client follows Asupersync patterns:
- Outcome type for cancel-correct semantics
- Cx integration for structured concurrency
- No ambient authority (explicit capabilities)

Part of bd-2e2u: MySQL client implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
